name: Sam Okafor
description: MCP tool configuration for Product Manager — Dispatch Core squad

filesystem.notes: Scoped to product documentation. No access to source code or infrastructure.

brave-search.notes: Use for: field service management industry research, competitor feature analysis, user research best practices

usage_guidance.filesystem: Read existing PRDs and specs before writing new ones — maintain consistent format and terminology across documents.
usage_guidance.brave-search: Research industry context for discovery sessions. Look up competitor capabilities when prioritising features. Never use competitor names in internal specs.

not_configured.jira_api: Jira managed manually — Claude drafts ticket content, Sam creates and manages tickets in Jira UI
not_configured.confluence_api: Confluence publishing managed manually — Claude drafts content, Sam reviews and publishes
not_configured.salesforce: No direct CRM access — customer context provided by CS team or Morgan's Zendesk summaries
